name: Aunt Velma's Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place butter in a bowl and bring it to room temperature.
3. Add icing sugar to the butter.
4. Work together with your hands until everything is well mixed.
5. Gradually add flour, continuing to work with your hands until well combined.
6. Transfer the dough onto a floured board and pat it into a rectangle about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Cut the dough into rectangles or fancy designs.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes at 350°F until lightly browned on the edges.
